reviews.review_description:
I’m 63 and my “shoot ‘em up” video game playing days may be behind me 

So I look for these immersive puzzle games on my Quest 3

Just Wow developers!  The game playing days may and puzzles were just perfect, as was the soundtrack

As the final song played, I just sat and applauded and listened through the entire credits

I didn't expect the game to focus on mental health, but it does so in a really clever and compassionate way, all while being fun and visually stunning. The puzzles aren't difficult; they're quite creative and one-of-a-kind. I definitely recommend it.

reviews.review_title: It's barely okay that's for sure
reviews.review_description:
So I loved the first game I left the story the art style and more so when I had the chance to play the this game I was excited but sadly it's underwhelming 
So the gameplay it's almost the same the puzzle solving feels a little less than a first game it's hard to explain it feels like you're doing less 

The voice acting sound characters are amazing like the mole but many just awful it feels like they're reading from the script and the worst is the cat the first one was amazing world written cat this one feels like child 

The graphics are still nice not bad I say it's very well done

The music as well it's atmospheric so it's doing very good job 

The story no spoilers feels like it's trying to do serious story but it's written like someone who didn't understand the assignment the metaphors so bold you can understand what the spot the end of the story generic I felt like a parent hearing his child telling a story and already understanding but still smiling and nodding 

So I will give it two stars will i recommend it? I don't know I think I would rather play the first one then this one

Storytelling at its finest. Truly an experience I will take with me for the rest of my life, no exaggeration. If you played the 1st game, Down the Rabbit Hole, then you know the gameplay and puzzles are solid. Where the first one took the perspective of telling a story to a child, this one was definitely deeper and more mature in its themes. As a new father and a man approaching his mid-life, this one hit hard. I got choked up at the midpoint, and bawled at the end while holding my baby afterwards.

It's a really good game! Took a couple days to finish it and find all the pieces. But I really enjoyed the story and gameplay! Perfect for sitting down and playing. Not really dizzy since you control the speed and movement when moving the platform around. The storyline was really good. Almost cried near the end listening to her husband and daughter.

I don't even know where to begin. I just finished this game and I'm still obsessed with every facet of it. Concept. Graphics. Diorama style. Dialogue/interactions. The story itself. I was not prepared for the emotional reaction I had at the end either. I personally prefer games that don't involve combat or timed challenges, nor do I like overly complicated puzzles, but to each their own. This game had none of these things. It lets you go at your own pace. I have never been so sad to complete a game. Kudos to the creators and I will be watching for more titles! If I could rate this higher than 5 stars, I absolutely would.

Honestly, this game for me took VR to a whole new level. More please!!

Beautiful and immersive game with great visuals and a magical atmosphere. I enjoyed it even more than Down the Rabbit Hole, which was also a wonderful experience. The puzzles are simple but very fun, and the music and story make the game emotionally immersive.

There are not much GOOD games for women on any platform to play.
But this one, magical. The world itself made interesting, love the gameplay, mini games and interpretation of the story!✨
Relaxing and fun 10/10🙌

Well done to everyone who was involved in creating!🤝
This was a beautiful game that vaguely reminded me of the game moss at parts and little nightmares somewhat. Beautiful story and wonderful puzzles with a truly delightful lesson to be learned.

I do not think I would like this kind of game the kind where you just work a little person and run around I always like the kind of game where I was the person in the game, but I thought I’d give it a try and oh my God I am so glad I did. This game is absolutely beautiful. It’s immersive. It’s a wonderful story and I can’t wait to actually play it again. You just have to give it a try. It’s so addictive once I started to play. I hardly could put it down. ! ￼Please give me more like this.!!!!
I love both of these games—I’m so happy there’s two adventures!! I wish there was a little more 1st person exploring but I still love the layout. Somewhat short games but still awesome.

I'm almost at the end and it's gotten so deep into the challenges of life that it's mind blowing. Really emotional!
Whoever came up with the mirrors idea is genius. It gave me epiphanies!
One of the best games I have ever played I love the play style and the storyline this game is almost as good as the moss books just amazing.

reviews.review_title: Weird in more ways than one
reviews.review_description: Beautifully crafted game making a good fist of recreating the feeling of unease and being slightly off-balance that the original story generates. However, I found there was a level of disconnect between the story, some references, and the difficulty level of the puzzles. The story clearly addressed adult themes and the whimsy is interspersed with references to sex and drugs - which is fine, except for the fact that the puzzles wouldn't challenge the average 10 year old. I finished the game quite quickly for me (I usually take my time!) and am left wondering (pun intended) who the target audience is supposed to be.
Wow pretty good
Unique Gameplay Mechanics
I got this game via horizon+. Pretty graphics and the puzzles are fun. Felt a bit sad with the ending but to each his own.

this game is so much more than I thought it would be. The world is immersive, it’s stunning, the mechanics are brilliant. The progression is flawless, I’ve never been more satisfied with a game in my entire life. You can play this game again and again, the small choose your own path elements starting soft and leading up to the more serious tone of the underlying plot really bring such a unique depth to one of the most wonderfully thought out games I’ve ever played. It’s intricate where it needs to be but also simple in the best ways. The puzzles are just difficult enough to stimulate you but not hard enough to put the game down over. Well done, I would recommend this game to anyone. I was crying my eyes out at the end
Excellent game.
Great game, I like it

reviews.review_title: A magical fairytale I didn't want to end
reviews.review_description:
What an incredible journey! If you loved Down the Rabbit Hole, then "Escaping Wonderland" is an absolute must-play. The game is breathtakingly beautiful, and the diorama format is perfected here. On Quest 3, everything looks so sharp and vibrant—it feels like you're peeking into a tiny, living fairytale world.
The ending, however, was the highlight for me. The final song "Molly's Lullaby" (feat. Phoebe Engelbert) is sheer class! The music is so atmospheric and touching that I sat through the entire credits with goosebumps. It’s the perfect emotional wrap-up for Molly’s story.
I’m so sad it’s already over—high-quality, story-driven VR titles like this are rare. No mindless coin-collecting or rushing, just clever puzzles, a stellar soundtrack, and total immersion. I will definitely play this again later just to soak in the atmosphere. Kudos to the developers!

I've only had my Meta 3 couple of days and this  game was fantastic, great introduction to VR for me. Beautiful looking, and so immersive.
The puzzles were fun and the overall look of the game was an experience to behold.
Please more of this!
I loved this game, it was a bit boring initially but then by the end I loved it. Just a lovely game good puzzles (not too challenging) and a good story.

I was not prepared for how thoughtfully creative and interactive this would be.  I'm a 52-year-old woman and absolutely love this game. The problem solving, creative thinking, puzzles, visuals, effects, storyline...I have found myself lost for hours in this game. Definitely recommend!

This game is the best one I have came across so far. I am fairly new to the meta quest but have tried loads. The outlay of this game is so magical. I'd very highly recommend it, and hoping there's more out there like this type. It isn't over challenging but has you scratching your head at times. The only issue I have with it however, it doesn't last long, took me two sessions to complete it. I'm hoping they make more and let them last longer. Brilliant 10/10

This was top notch, from the gameplay to the storytelling. The voice acting was perfect and I really loved the sense of humor in this game. I really can't complain about anything other than I would have loved ten times more gameplay. 😁
It's stunning, with great characters and the voice of voice acting is superb.. I'll probably play it again. The first game was very good, and this is a fitting continuation.
Best game I've played in a long time. Very clever

reviews.review_title: LOVE LOVE LOVE what they have done!
reviews.review_description: I cannot count the number of refunds I made looking for a game I liked until I found Down the Rabbit Hole.  It had some kinks and they have worked them ALL out in this new game.  I didn't hesitate at all to pay full price for this game and I am on a budget like most.  They have earned it and more.  THis is what a VR game should be like.  Interactive, DIFFERENT puzzles,  relaxing but makes you curious to poke around and look in crooks and crannies, decent story.  I wish more companies out there got the memo about what VR should be like.  And I don't get vertigo or motion sickness either.

reviews.review_title: THE GAME OF THE YEAR! EVERY YEAR!
reviews.review_description:
PLAY THIS GAME! I love when a game can be entertaining and provides real substance.
The game is fun, the puzzles are not very difficult but they are good. The game looks and sounds wonderful.
Above all, it grabs your heart from the first scene and doesn’t let go.
Wonderfully done. Kept me engaged the whole game. Would recommend to anyone.

Absolutely love the game play.   It's a very immersive VR environment -- one of the best I've experienced.

Puzzles were a bit on the easy side. But, the fun of the game made up for that.
I end up cryinggg T.T
Just a fun and beautiful game - with a wonderful story.

This game is fantastic. Beautiful and interesting. I loved the story, and the puzzles. I hope they make other games.

Don't miss this one if you like puzzles, a great story, fun characters, and a wonderful experience.
Great story line, lovely graphics 👌 Its very addictive and don't want it to end
This was a fun adventure I didn't want to end!

there were chapters that I could have finished faster but it wouldn't give me an option to click on a character the first time. only after I shut down the game and go back on in does it give me the option to click on something and then proceed. or I would get a hint for something and I wouldnt understand it but once it (finally) allows me to get to what I first should have been allowed to click on the hints make sense and I could continue the game.
I loved this game.  Looking forward to playing others like this one.

This is a wonderful game. Fun puzzles and awesome
 interaction with the characters. I am having a problem though. I need to pick the tail feather but I cannot get a prompt to pluck it. Can't go any further. Thanks

This game was amazing i love like the details in each level it was such amazing and i love that played on real fears people have it is so immersive and just so awesome i wanna recommend this game to everybody
Both games are in top 10 VR games here.

I loves the first game and was so excited to play this one. The way these games play is so unique and satisfying. The level of detail is so incredible and doesnt go unnoticed. Please continue to make more of these!

I am kind of a sucker for this kind of universe full disclose . However it was an impulse purchase and I’m glad I did. 
It’s fun and got a great atmosphere with just enough different to make it fun. Definitely a great little game .

Would give more than 5 stars if I could, I am in love with this game! One of the best story with puzzles and very cozy to play! Also, love the first one (down the rabbit hole). Definitely looking forward to more great games like this from the studio!
Absolutely brilliant!!!!
Really fun and detailed. I love the interaction. Can't wait for the next one in the series. Great work devs!
If you are looking for a game that feels like you are really there,  get this game.  It is also very much a puzzle game that will give you many hours and levels of challenging puzzles.  Just get it!
Great game

Love this adventure finding things, looking for the clues, graphics are great. Just amazing how the developer comes up with these, I have both so far keep them coming. 
Thanks for making these
Interesting concept and a beautiful game!

Let me preface this by saying I am a full grown adult living a full grown adult life and LOVED this game. It feels so magical and the puzzles are challenging, but not so challenging that it becomes frustrating. Really feels like you are there. Amazing graphics. The storyline is profound and touching. Really clever twists and turns. Looked forward to each new, magical room or level as I went through. Didn’t want to put it down. Hope they make a 3.
Thoroughly enjoyed this game. One of the best I’ve played in a long time!
It’s a perfect mix of heart, humor, and brainpower—ideal for players who want more than just gameplay.
Absolutely brilliant thoroughly enjoyed it and cannot wait to see what the devs do next.good job👌
I want to start by saying I’m almost twenty, twenty. This game is wonderful and definitely one of my favorites, with a very emotional ending set to a very strong end credits music. Definitely a must

I absolutely loved this game, and the first one as well.  The environments are beautiful, the gameplay is engaging and the story is touching.  If another one is made, I will buy it without a second thought.  There would certainly be an interesting story if Alice was to return.

This game succeeds on so many levels. Graphics, voices and music are wonderful. The puzzles are challenging, but never illogical. I never had to resort to cheating. They vary greatly and are very rewarding. But the best is the story behind the obvious. It is very heart warming and deeply profound. But i don‘t want to give anything away. I played this game without having played its predecessor „Down the Rabbit Hole“ and did not have the feeling to have missed anything.  But I will get that one, too.

From Down the Rabbit Hole to this sequel, I was completely intrigued. A storyline that pulls from Alice in Wonderland (obviously) yet introduces many new elements. Will bring feelings of nostalgia but still keeps you on the edge not knowing what will happen next. Definitely has me longing for a 3rd!

I just finished this and i really enjoyed it. Great little puzzles and a great story.
The world that's created here in VR really adds a wonderful atmosphere with fantastic gameplay and lovely detailed graphics.
I hope for more adventures in wonderland.
I finished it in 3 days and now I’m sad it’s over.  I love the way these games are structured.  Puzzles have moderate difficulty.  I really enjoyed it.  53F

We enjoyed this colorful VR program. The puzzles are not too difficult and the world at your fingertips (via vines) made it thoroughly interactive and fun. I like this stacked approach to storytelling.

So far I'm enjoying it. However, there seems to be an odd design choice in the collectibles. If missed first time round are locked out and you can't get them all. In particular, in the diamond mine level, I can see the 3D glasses on the table by dynamite box, but because I've already done that section of the puzzle, I can't interact with it to pick them up.??

I completed Down the Rabbit Hole and loved it, so bought the Wonderland game.  These games are perfect and really enjoyable to play, sorting out problems and puzzles. Developers, will you be doing more of these games as they really are fantastic 😊
I did not expect a VR game to make me sob, but it did. The storytelling is amazing, and the message made me sob. I would recommend this game to everyone I know.
Buy this game you won’t regret it. I am patiently waiting on number 3￼

reviews.review_title: It started out ok, then got really weird
reviews.review_description: I really liked the game Down the Rabbit Hole and thought this would be similar. Appropriately named, as about half-way through you find the game has taken you down an uncomfortable, dreary, depressing turn and you are glad when you finally escape the game entirely….never to return. The character you play, Molly, is a child for the first half who eventually discovers that she’s a married woman who has had a complete mental breakdown and escaped back into her childhood. Throughout the entire game she is assumed to hate herself and how she looks, is afraid of everything, and couldn’t hack adult life (wife and motherhood) without becoming a terrible person and having a mental breakdown.  She has to go to a freakish cult of old people (all creepy old women in ritual robes with men’s voices…so weird) in a nursing home where she picks up the rx pills they drop when they violently fall….after they make gross comments about what they do between the sheets. The caterpillar talks about how he’s on drugs, and Molly (yes, we get the meaning of her name) makes comments about being an alcoholic when she finds a room of booze, pills, and skulls. If you’re a mentally ill person who is recovering from a cult, addiction, and /or unresolved childhood offenses and need constant reassurance that you don’t have to kill yourself because you grew into a grown woman …then this is for you. It left me feeling ill at ease and glad it was over when I finally escaped. Never playing that one again, and I’ll certainly not ever have my daughter play it. Don’t get this one for your kids or teens, or really anyone with a bit of resilience, self-esteem or general lack of self-loathing.

reviews.review_title: Amazing VR experience! So much fun!
reviews.review_description: I'm in love with this game. I enjoyed old OC point and click games like King's Quest & Grim Fandango back in the day. This seems like the next generation of fantasy adventure games. I love immersing myself in this fun, stress free, whimsical story book adventure world.

I enjoyed Down the Rabbit Hole, but this blew it away. Puzzles are just the right level of difficulty for me (I'd like to think I'm clever but I run to YouTube when easily frustrated). Also nice mix of puzzle types, and the zoom feature to get closer to characters is just *chef's kiss* Pace is perfect; no time limits, and I like you can revisit all the levels to find missing puzzle pieces. Every time it seemed like it would get scary (ahem Jabberwock) it took a turn to the humorous. Such attention to detail. I'll bet the photos on the floor in the village are the devs and pets :) Voice work, camera work, story, graphics. Just top marks to all of it!

developer_response.body: Aww, thank you so much for the kind words! We aimed to maintain all the good things from the original and then build out the experience further, and we're glad you felt it was just right! ✨

reviews.review_description: Loved this from the beginning to the end, what a brilliant well thought out game. Thankyou.

I played Down the Rabbit Hole and Escaping Wonderland back to back. If you're reading this then you already know generally what to expect - it's a great looking game built in the same style as Moss. Escaping Wonderland is longer and has more in the way of puzzles than Down the Rabbit Hole but it's still more story centric with limited game mechanics. If this sounds like what your looking for then that's great but as someone who is looking for combat and/or puzzles this left me wanting.
Maybe a bit easy, but that makes it good for kids too.  Cute adventure.
Super

"Escaping Wonderland is a huge step up from the previous game with its more in-depth puzzles and larger scale. Whilst it may still be on the short side, that don’t that discourage you from diving down the rabbit hole one more time!"

Read the full review over at The Elite Institute (dot) net!

The game is awesome, I just bought it but, for some reason the“A” won’t appear above the puzzle I need to put together next to the mouse lady, so I’m just stuck😪 then, when something like this happens it takes forever for someone to get back to you. This is the fourth game I’ve had glitching problems with on oculus!!I haves problem with witchblood, Lucky’s tale, rainbow reactor fusion and this one, just irritating, I don’t have money to throw away, I just want to play the game I paid for or be compensated, this isn’t right.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you have encountered this issue. Make sure that you have all 4 pieces of the recipe before talking to Mrs Mouse. We found out an issue that she says you have all the pieces of the recipe even though you only have 3 out of 4. We are going to include a fix for this in the next update, but hopefully this will help you progress in the meantime!

reviews.review_description:
I kind of liked Down the Rabbit Hole, but found it much too simple as a game to leave a lasting impression on me. Escaping Wonderland, however, is a huge improvement on all accounts. Story is more engaging, humour and characters are adorable, voice acting is strong and gameplay, while still on easy side, is very enjoyable. To top it off, graphics are absolutely superb!
The only con, I'd say, is the ending, that is just a little bit... too sweet. At least compared to the rest of the game, that is really nicely manoeuvring between storytelling&humour that are perfect for all: younger and older audience. 
That's a tiny complaint though.
All in all, it's so good, that I'd say it's on the same level as excellent MOSS games.
Strong recommendation, even for those that weren't a huge fans of the first game.

developer_response.body: Oh wow, thank you so much for the glowing words! Thank you for taking the time to review; the team loves to hear the feedback!

reviews.review_title: An amazing game that feels unfinished
reviews.review_description:
The game concept is amazing, and I was very excited about it! I purchased it as soon as it came out hoping for a grand adventure game that was a new concept to VR. As soon as I started playing I was disappointed, although my expectations were set high for the game, so maybe I was expecting too much. The game has many features that are incomplete. If you press your right joystick you get teleported outside of the map. If you pull yourself forward you can look into rooms you haven’t found yet. Navigating the character from a third person is challenging, and frankly not the type of experience that is good for VR. The game is marked as having many first person experiences, and yet despite playing for 2-3 hours I only came across one to three that were very short. 

In addition to that there is a very flimsy backstory to the game , that feels like it is marked more towards little kids. The dialogue is ridiculously long for a game that backstory is so undeveloped. 

This game has managed to get several things right. It is a unique experience to VR, and it has fun elements to it that have not been seen before in VR. It’s a long game, and one that is entertaining.

Overall it is a game that isn’t worth the $20 price tag, but is a good buy if it’s closer to $10. The game is unique, but many features feel very glitchy.

developer_response.body: Hi chicago_official. Sad to hear you don't feel the game is worth the cost. Please let us know if there is anything we could do to help you change your mind besides lowering the price. We still hope you played the game to the end so you got a reveal to the backstory flimsiness. Thanks for taking the time to review and we'll investigate the glitches you are referring to.

reviews.review_description: The story is OK, the graphic is nice, but it was so easy that it seems more like an interactive story then a puzzle game.

developer_response.body: Hey there and thank you for taking the time to review! We've aimed to make the game as accessible as possible for a wider audience; we hope you enjoyed the experience nevertheless 🙏

reviews.review_description: Please make another sequel!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to drop us a review and we're so glad you liked it! 🙏
And if lovely people like yourself keep promoting the game we might get to make a sequel. ❤️

reviews.review_description: This game is so beautiful and the story line is good. I bought this game three days ago and I’ve already beat it. Definitely worth your money. I love this game.
